summary: Deployment verification of CaptureAgent (FastAPI + asyncpg + external Supabase PostgreSQL + CRA). All 5 requested checks PASS via pytest (backend, 7/7 tests) and Playwright (register→verify→login→onboarding→settings UI flow). No app code was modified — testing only.

issues: The 'live, server-side' phrase inside the lock-info banner wraps oddly onto its own vertical column between the two halves of the sentence, so the copy reads as 'They are used / live, server-side / for the AI Intelligence scan…' — cosmetic word-break/flex layout bug, not functional.

action_items: None blocking deployment. Optional cosmetic: fix the 'live, server-side' flex-wrap in /app/frontend/src/pages/Settings.js (the live, server-side span inside the info banner).
Consider removing (or gating on NODE_ENV=development) the two React Router v7 future-flag console warnings and the /api/auth/me 401 (pre-login probe) noise so the browser console is clean in prod.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py CORS uses allow_origins=[FRONTEND_URL, http://localhost:3000] with allow_credentials=True — preview domain (govcon-workspace.preview.emergentagent.com) is not in the list. Requests still work because the frontend calls the backend on the same origin via ingress, so no CORS pre-flight is triggered; but if the app is ever hit from a different origin this will break. Acceptable as-is per the deployment-verification-only constraint.

auth.py /register unconditionally sets auth cookies BEFORE email verification and returns the payload with email_verified=false. This is intentional per the mocked-email design (banner + Resend link surface later), but worth noting as a security consideration for production email enablement.

auth.py login attempt counter uses ip:email as identifier and stores lock_until on every failure via ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE — the lock_until is overwritten on each attempt, effectively giving a rolling 15-minute window on attempt #6+ rather than a fixed lockout. Works correctly but slightly non-standard (each failed attempt resets the timer).
orgs.py invite_member masks the invite URL with the production FRONTEND_URL (https://captureagent.us), same pattern as verify/reset — expected given deployment context.
test_credentials: qa.captureagent@testmail.dev / CaptureQA#2026  (created by backend test, org 'QA Verification Org' created). UI test also created qa.ui.<epoch>@testmail.dev with 'QA UI Verification Org'. Both stored in the live external Supabase.
seed_data_creation: 1 QA user + 1 org via pytest, 1 UI QA user + 1 org via Playwright. All in live Supabase (user acknowledged this in the request).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is on external Supabase Postgres — NO MongoDB. /api/health returns {status:ok,service:captureagent}. Email flows are mocked and return verifyUrl/resetUrl in the JSON body. Cookies (access_token + refresh_token) are httponly + samesite=none + secure. Use test file /app/backend/tests/test_deploy_verification.py for regression. QA account 'qa.captureagent@testmail.dev' + org 'QA Verification Org' already exist; test re-runs handle both fresh + existing states.

verification_check_results.2_register_verify: PASS — POST /api/auth/register returned verifyUrl with token query param; token extracted; POST /api/auth/verify-email {token} returned {ok:true}
verification_check_results.3_login: PASS — POST /api/auth/login set httponly access_token cookie; GET /api/auth/me returned the user; UI login at /login navigated to /dashboard
verification_check_results.4_create_org: PASS — POST /api/orgs 200 with role=owner; UI onboarding at /onboarding created org and navigated to /dashboard
verification_check_results.5_settings_masked_keys: PASS — /settings rendered with data-testids anthropic-key, sam-key, openai-key, rotate-key, save-keys; all key inputs are empty (real values never sent to browser); backend GET /api/orgs/{id}/secrets returns masked previews + *Set booleans
